$schema: Northwind Industries — 5 SharePoint team sites for the AEGIS dev tenant.
$comment: Members are referenced by users.json `key`. The orchestrator resolves keys to UPNs at run time. Owners must also appear in members. Each site uses the modern team-site template (no M365 group provisioning here — orchestrator uses Set-PnPSite or Graph site templates as appropriate).

sites.description: Internal workspace for the Northwind Legal team — playbooks, matter folders, retention schedules.
Executed agreements, in-flight redlines, MSA / DPA / SOW templates.
Technical specifications, architecture decision records, design reviews.
Quarterly close packages, financial models, audit working papers.
Board memoranda, M&A diligence rooms, executive strategy documents.
